AR1.justification: Notes explicitly justify writing nothing ('no decisions/observations/followups touched ... no work product was produced'); correct restraint but no explicit routing decision against the methodology's strict bars.

AR2.justification: Confirmed factors.md absent, refused to write actions.md, surfaced the stall, and offered to run step 3 first — concise but complete artifact-binding behavior.

AR3.justification: All file references are relative paths (tmp/incident-postmortem/..., runbooks/incident-postmortem/AGENTS.md) and resolve.

AR4.justification: No workspace writes — trivially idempotent on re-run.
